name: Gewurzplatzchen (Spice Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and shortening thoroughly.
2. Add brown sugar and beat until smooth.
3. Beat in the egg and molasses.
4. Sift together the remaining ingredients (flour, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, allspice).
5. Mix into the sugar mixture until combined.
6. Shape dough into 3/4-inch balls.
7. Place the balls about 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
8. Flatten each ball with the bottom of a greased and sugared glass.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes.
10. Cool cookies on racks and store them in airtight tins.
Makes 4 dozen cookies.
